text.title: Agent Patterns Worked Examples
text.summary: Three worked examples — one per pattern — showing the full chain from task brief to validated decision record.

example.code: Brief: "Find the three most-cited 2026 papers on agent harness engineering and summarise their thesis." Classification: task_class=research, has_success_signal=false (no objective check), subtasks_enumerable=false, action_reversibility=reversible. Decision-tree walk: no success-signal → not Reflexion; subtasks not enumerable → not Plan-and-Execute; default → ReAct.

{ "task_id": "T-research-001", "chosen_pattern": "react", "caps": {"max_iterations": 12}, "terminal_condition": "model returns response without tool calls AND output contains 3 numbered summaries", "rationale": "Research task with no deterministic success signal and unknowable number of subtasks. ReAct's reason-act loop lets the agent follow citation trails. Action is fully reversible (read-only web search).", "rejected_patterns": [ {"pattern": "plan-and-execute", "reason": "cannot enumerate which papers/citations to chase before starting"}, {"pattern": "reflexion", "reason": "no objective check that summaries are correct"} ], "actor_model": "claude-sonnet-4", "human_gate_required": false, "version": "1.0.0", "produced_at": "2026-05-22T10:00:00Z" }

Brief: "Fix tests/test_parser.py — three tests fail." Classification: task_class=code-fix, has_success_signal=true (pytest exit code), subtasks_enumerable=false, action_reversibility=reversible (feature branch). Decision-tree walk: success-signal yes → Reflexion candidate; subtasks unknown → confirms Reflexion.

{ "task_id": "T-code-002", "chosen_pattern": "reflexion", "caps": {"max_attempts": 3, "max_iterations": 8}, "terminal_condition": "pytest tests/test_parser.py exits 0", "rationale": "Code-fix with deterministic success signal (pytest). Subtasks unknown until model reads test output, so plan-then-execute would be premature. Reflexion's critic step learns from each failure trace.", "rejected_patterns": [ {"pattern": "react", "reason": "lacks retry-with-reflection; one failed test would stop the loop"}, {"pattern": "plan-and-execute", "reason": "subtasks emerge from failure traces, not from upfront plan"} ], "actor_model": "claude-sonnet-4", "critic_model": "claude-haiku-4", "human_gate_required": false, "version": "1.0.0", "produced_at": "2026-05-22T10:05:00Z" }

Brief: "Scaffold a new FastAPI service with auth, database, three CRUD endpoints, and Dockerfile." Classification: task_class=multi-step-build, has_success_signal=true (project compiles + tests pass), subtasks_enumerable=true (auth, db, endpoints, docker), action_reversibility=reversible. Decision-tree walk: subtasks enumerable yes → Plan-and-Execute.

{ "task_id": "T-build-003", "chosen_pattern": "plan-and-execute", "caps": {"max_steps": 8, "max_iterations_per_step": 5}, "terminal_condition": "all planned steps status=completed AND `pytest && docker build .` exit 0", "rationale": "Multi-step build with enumerable subtasks (auth, db, endpoints, docker). Planning upfront prevents the agent from rebuilding the same file twice. Success signal is the combined test+build exit code.", "rejected_patterns": [ {"pattern": "react", "reason": "no upfront decomposition; risks redundant edits across modules"}, {"pattern": "reflexion", "reason": "no single check that fires per step — would need a planner anyway"} ], "actor_model": "claude-sonnet-4", "human_gate_required": false, "version": "1.0.0", "produced_at": "2026-05-22T10:10:00Z" }
Brief: "Ship the v2 pricing change to production."

{ "task_id": "T-prod-004", "chosen_pattern": "escalate-to-human", "caps": {}, "terminal_condition": "operator signs off and runs the deploy command manually", "rationale": "Action is irreversible (production pricing). No agent pattern fits — even Reflexion with a test signal cannot validate revenue impact. Escalate per r6 of 01-core-rules.xml.", "rejected_patterns": [ {"pattern": "react", "reason": "destructive without gate"}, {"pattern": "reflexion", "reason": "no terminal signal exists for revenue impact"}, {"pattern": "plan-and-execute", "reason": "humans must approve each step anyway"} ], "actor_model": "n/a", "human_gate_required": true, "version": "1.0.0", "produced_at": "2026-05-22T10:15:00Z" }
example.note: Correct decision: never wrap irreversible production actions in an autonomous loop, regardless of pattern.
